fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item included in one ore more of the production BOM versions.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit of measure of the item that is included in the production BOM.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the entry.
